title: lithocarpus pattaniensis
intro: Lithocarpus pattaniensis, also known as the Patani Oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus pattaniensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. Lithocarpus pattaniensis is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as tea and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
